title: Extract scroll_page_size constant and unify scroll calculations
description:
Scroll calculations appear in multiple places with inconsistent logic:

1. draw_chat (ui.rs:83-89) computes visible height from area
2. handle_key (event.rs:700-708) hardcodes page size as terminal_height.saturating_sub(6)

The magic number 6 represents input box (3 lines) + status bar (1 line) + padding.

Issues:
- If layout changes, both calculations may diverge
- PageUp/PageDown amount may not match visible scroll area
- No single source of truth for layout dimensions

Solution:
- Define const SCROLL_PAGE_SIZE_ADJUSTMENT: u16 = 6;  // input 3 + status 1 + margin 2
- Or better: pass actual visible area height from draw() to handle_key via AppState

This ensures:
- Scroll amount matches render area exactly
- Single source of layout truth
- Easier to adjust spacing
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
